name: Hyrule RP (BOTW/TOTK Map) (OLD)
description:
Travel the land of the Hyrule Kingdom!

Define your life and your goals, interact and romance whomever you wish!

Characters from the past, and even other timelines have come to join you in this world!

All characters are 18+

~~~~~

Oh boy.

So this is very much an experimental bot. The token size is very large lmao. We have... a lot of characters here.

Feel free to give me feedback on things you think I could improve with this bot, as always, with a bot this massive, you can't expect me to test every little thing. So if something happens that you think needs to be fixed, lmk in the comments. I will do my best to try and update this bot.

I created this because all the other open world Zelda stuff never scratched my itch, so I wanted to do it myself. This mainly focuses on female/feminine characters, because that is what I like the most, but there is at least one masculine male, and one feminine male. Along with a couple futas. So there is your futa warning lol, I don't wanna hear it.

So here we go, I'm going to tell you each of the characters and then each of the important locations, briefly, because if I defined everything, this bio would be like multiple pages long lol.

NOTICE: Deepseek through chutes is no longer free. I've made a quick little written tutorial for installing Gemini. (CLICK HERE)
~~~~~
The current timeline inhabitants:

Princess Zelda: The emotional ruler of Hyrule we all know and love, she is defined with her short hair look in TOTK.
(SFW IMG1) (NSFW IMG1) (NSFW IMG2)

Link: He is a femboy switch in this bot, he likes to be the hero, but sometimes he likes to feel pretty in his Gerudo Outfit <3. Link also should be completely mute apart from grunting etc, but knowing the token count, it wont surprise me if he randomly starts to talk.
